question.ask: 10. What will Mr Lee teach the students to do?

info.value: Attention, boys and girls! I will tell you something exciting. We are going to take a trip to a farm this Sunday. We will meet at the school library at 9 o'clock in the morning. There will be two buses in front of the library. 20 students will take the No.1 Bus. And the other 25 students will take the No.2 Bus. After we arrive at the farm, please be careful and polite. Mr Lee, the owner of the farm, will show us around and teach us how to pick apples and make apple cakes. Hope you will enjoy yourselves on the farm.
